name: MemoryRelay AI
description: MemoryRelay v0.19.0 - Long-term memory with pipeline architecture, 42 tools, 17 commands, V2 async, sessions, decisions, patterns & projects (api.memoryrelay.net)

apiKey.label: MemoryRelay API Key
apiKey.help: API key from memoryrelay.ai (or use ${MEMORYRELAY_API_KEY} env var)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Unique identifier for this agent in MemoryRelay (or use ${MEMORYRELAY_AGENT_ID} env var)

apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: MemoryRelay API endpoint (or use ${MEMORYRELAY_API_URL} env var)

defaultProject.label: Default Project
defaultProject.help: Default project slug for scoping sessions, decisions, and memories

enabledTools.label: Enabled Tools
enabledTools.help: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (default: all)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoSessions.label: Auto-Sessions
autoSessions.help: Automatically create/close MemoryRelay sessions on agent start/end

excludeChannels.label: Exclude Channels
excludeChannels.help: List of channel IDs to skip auto-recall (e.g., ['whatsapp:group_123', 'telegram:456'])

sessionTimeoutMinutes.label: Session Timeout (minutes)
sessionTimeoutMinutes.help: Auto-close MemoryRelay sessions inactive for this many minutes (default: 120)

sessionCleanupIntervalMinutes.label: Cleanup Interval (minutes)
sessionCleanupIntervalMinutes.help: How often to check for stale sessions (default: 30)

maxSessionAgeHours.label: Max Session Age (hours)
maxSessionAgeHours.help: Automatically close sessions older than this (default: 24, 0 to disable)

idleTimeoutMinutes.label: Idle Timeout (minutes)
idleTimeoutMinutes.help: Close sessions inactive for this long (default: 60)

maxSessions.label: Max Active Sessions
maxSessions.help: Stop creating new sessions when this limit is reached (default: 50, 0 for unlimited)

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.help: Maximum number of memories to inject per auto-recall (1-20)

recallThreshold.label: Recall Threshold
recallThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for auto-recall (0-1, higher = stricter matching)

warnAtPercent.label: Warn at Quota %
warnAtPercent.help: Log warning when API usage exceeds this percentage of quota (default: 75)

criticalAtPercent.label: Critical at Quota %
criticalAtPercent.help: Log critical alert when API usage exceeds this percentage of quota (default: 90)

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable debug logging of API calls

verbose.label: Verbose Logging
verbose.help: Include request/response bodies in debug logs (requires debug: true)

maxLogEntries.label: Max Log Entries
maxLogEntries.help: Circular buffer size for in-memory debug logs (10-10,000)

namespace.isolateAgents.label: Isolate Agent Memories
namespace.isolateAgents.help: Keep each agent's memories separate. Disable to share across all agents.

namespace.subagentPolicy.label: Subagent Memory Policy
namespace.subagentPolicy.help: inherit: subagents use parent's memories. isolate: separate namespace. skip: no memory access.

autoCapture.maxMessageLength.label: Max Capture Length
autoCapture.maxMessageLength.help: Messages longer than this are truncated before capture.

autoCapture.stripLargeCodeBlocks.label: Strip Large Code Blocks
autoCapture.stripLargeCodeBlocks.help: Remove code blocks over 500 chars from captured content.

apiKey.description: MemoryRelay API key (optional, can use MEMORYRELAY_API_KEY env var)

agentId.description: Unique agent identifier (optional, can use MEMORYRELAY_AGENT_ID env var or agent name)

defaultProject.description: Default project slug for scoping sessions, decisions, and memories

enabledTools.description: Comma-separated tool groups to enable: memory, entity, agent, session, decision, pattern, project, health, or 'all' (default: all)

confirmFirst.description: Number of captures to confirm before auto-accepting

blocklist.description: Regex patterns for content to never capture

autoCapture.description: Auto-capture configuration. Use true/false for simple toggle, or object for fine-grained control.

autoSessions.description: Automatically create and close MemoryRelay sessions on agent start/end. Disable to prevent session proliferation.

excludeChannels.description: List of channel IDs to exclude from auto-recall

sessionTimeoutMinutes.description: Auto-close sessions inactive for this many minutes

sessionCleanupIntervalMinutes.description: How often to check for stale sessions (minutes)

maxSessionAgeHours.description: Automatically close sessions older than this many hours (0 to disable)

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Close sessions idle for this many minutes

maxSessions.description: Maximum active sessions before rejecting new ones (0 for unlimited)

warnAtPercent.description: Log warning when quota usage exceeds this percentage

criticalAtPercent.description: Log critical alert when quota usage exceeds this percentage

debug.description: Enable debug logging of API calls

verbose.description: Include request/response bodies in debug logs

maxLogEntries.description: Circular buffer size for in-memory logs

localCache.description: Local SQLite cache for fast, offline-capable memory access

syncIntervalMinutes.description: How often to sync with the API (minutes)

maxLocalMemories.description: Maximum number of memories to keep locally
